title: Delicate Irish Frittata
description: A delicate and flavorful Irish frittata made with eggs, vegetables, and cheese.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onion, sliced mushrooms, and minced garlic until the vegetables are tender.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, shredded cheese, and chopped spinach.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked vegetables in the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to carefully loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet.
Slide the frittata onto a plate and serve hot.
